# Sample AGENTS.md

The OpenCode project instruction file (the equivalent of Claude Code's
`CLAUDE.md`). Loaded as guidance at the start of a session. Plain markdown, no
frontmatter. When both `AGENTS.md` and `CLAUDE.md` exist, OpenCode uses
`AGENTS.md`.

## Conventions

- Prefer small, composable changes.
- Run the test suite before proposing a diff.
